text: 1130 - وَقَالَ لَهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ رَجُلٌ أُصَلِّي فِي أَهْلِي ثُمَّ أَخْرُجُ إِلَى اَلْمَسْجِدِ فَيُقَدِّمُونِي فَقَالَ «تَقَدَّمْ لاَ عَلَيْكَ وَ صَلِّ بِهِمْ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1130 - A man said to him (as):
"I pray with my family, then I go to the mosque and they ask me to lead them in prayer."
Imam (as) said: "Go ahead and lead them; there is no harm in it. Pray with them."
